title: Saudi crude exports recovery continues as products decline
section_path: Saudi crude exports recovery continues as products decline
section_path_text: Saudi crude exports recovery continues as products decline
summary:
Saudi Arabia's crude exports in November have continued to rise m-o-m following a slump in August, but refined products exports have fallen to multi-year lows. In this insight, we examine the magnitude of this divergence and put it in context of wider OPEC+ trends. By Jay Maroo
Vortexa preliminary data for the first half of November (days 1-15) show Saudi exports have crossed the 6.5mbd mark for the first time since June this year.

children.section_path_text: Saudi Arabia's crude exports in November have continued to rise m-o-m following a slump in August, but refined products exports have fallen to multi-year lows. In this insight, we examine the magnitude of this divergence and put it in context of wider OPEC+ trends.
children.summary:
By Jay Maroo
Vortexa preliminary data for the first half of November (days 1-15) show Saudi exports have crossed the 6.5mbd mark for the first time since June this year. The November figure also marks a strong rebound from the 5.4mbd seen in August (see chart below).
